escalatedRisks.risk: 🎉🎉🎉 DDR5 spot $46.000 — SEVENTEEN consecutive ATH — LARGEST single-session gain (+$0.767, +1.70%) in 57-day observation period.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING — June 18 session confirmed $46.000。Record single-session dollar gain (+$0.767) and percentage (+1.70%)。$45.233→$46.000 in one session。Market closed Jun 19-20 (Dragon Boat Festival) + weekend = 3-day gap。Next session Jun 22 tests $46 support。自5/20 $41.100累计+$4.900(+11.92%)22个交易日。$47仅差$1.000。
escalatedRisks.source: DRAMeXchange June 18, 2026 session + web search verification
escalatedRisks.detail: DDR5 spot reached $46.000 on June 18 — seventeenth consecutive ATH session。Largest single-session gain of the entire 57-day observation period。Combined with DDR4 16Gb at $69.125 (+1.47%) and DDR3 at $10.976 (+1.10%), all three DRAM generations in synchronized acceleration。Market closed 3 days for Dragon Boat Festival + weekend — intense pressure buildup for June 22 session。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 Newegg 9550 Pro 30.72TB OOS Day 14 — TWO-WEEK MILESTONE. Structural OOS irreversible. Retail enterprise SSD flagship unavailable for 14 consecutive days.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL — June 21, 2026。Newegg 9550 Pro retail flagship OOS for 14 consecutive days — two-week milestone。CDW improved to 'expected 8-10 days' (E3.S form factor) — trend improving but not yet in-stock。SS $17,700 Day 48 sole reliable in-stock anchor。CDW-G status unverified today。SHI statuses unverified。
escalatedRisks.detail: Day 14 = two-week milestone → structural OOS for retail channel firmly irreversible。CDW improvement to 'expected 8-10 days' represents continued recovery trend (Backordered → will ship when in stock → 8-10 days), but still not immediate availability。Enterprise channels absorbing overflow demand from retail。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 DDR4 16Gb $69.125 (+1.47%) largest gain — approaching $70 psychological level. DDR3 $10.976 (+1.10%) accelerating Day 11. Three-generation DRAM synchronized supercycle.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING - June 21, 2026。DDR4 16Gb single-session +$1.000 = +1.47%。5th consecutive day outpacing DDR5。June-to-date +$8.025 (+13.1%)。DDR4 8Gb $35.900 (+0.28%) third day recovery。DDR3 +1.10% Day 11 acceleration。Three-generation synchronized bull market unprecedented in breadth and velocity。
escalatedRisks.detail: The DDR4 16Gb→DDR5 outperformance is now 5 days old with accelerating magnitude。DDR4 8Gb recovery third consecutive day confirms consumer-side correction exhausted。DDR3's +1.10% shows DDR4→DDR3 spillover deepening into second week。All three DRAM generations in synchronized acceleration — historically unprecedented breadth。$70 DDR4 16Gb imminent。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 WF6 H2 2026 supply gap 2,200 tons/year + China WF6 price +203.83% MoM. 10 DAYS to July 1 permanent shutdown.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL - 10 days to July 1 shutdown。2,200 tons/year gap = ~25% of global WF6 capacity。Kanto Denka + Central Glass permanent shutdown。China WF6 price $149.79/kg (+203.83% MoM / +232.7% YoY)。Korean suppliers (SK Specialty/Foosung) notified 70-90% price increases。12-18 month qualification cycle。No relief until H1 2028。Combined with MLC exit (9 days), unprecedented dual supply contraction in FINAL 10 DAYS。
escalatedRisks.detail: Every semiconductor manufacturing process using CVD tungsten deposition affected。Combined with MLC NAND exit (9 days), unprecedented dual supply contraction for NAND manufacturing。No new relief information。Korean alternative suppliers face feedstock constraints from same Chinese tungsten export controls。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — FINAL 9 DAYS。Samsung Line 12 (Hwaseong) 2D NAND→HBM4 DRAM conversion confirmed。Global MLC capacity -41.7% in 2026。MLC spot tripled to $20-28。
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — June 21, 2026。Final 9 days of MLC NAND production。Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND March 2026, physically converted to HBM4 DRAM。Combined with WF6 crisis (10 days), NAND manufacturing faces unprecedented dual supply contraction entering FINAL 10 days。Kioxia full 2D NAND exit by 2029。Micron curtailing MLC to existing commitments only。
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND production March 2026, physically converted to HBM4。MLC NAND final shipments June 2026 — only 9 days remain。Combined with WF6 crisis, dual supply contraction with quantified shortfalls。9 days to act before both supply sources permanently offline。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢🟢 Mouser QLC 61.44TB U.2 restored to 4 units — breaks 33-day depletion streak. Improvement 15 days ahead of expected 7/6 restock date.
escalatedRisks.status: IMPROVED — June 21, 2026。Previously 1 unit for 33 consecutive days (May 19 - June 20)。Today confirmed 4 units at $34,356。Arrived ~15 days ahead of expected July 6 restock。Price unchanged。Supply still tight (4 units vs historical 10+ units)。E1.L 4 units Day 15 stable。SS $27,500-$31,500, GovConnection $34,383, Newegg/Wiredzone/Best Buy five-channel alternative healthy。
escalatedRisks.source: Mouser Electronics June 21, 2026 web search verification
escalatedRisks.detail: U.2 61.44TB improved from 1→4 units, breaking the 33-day depletion streak。Arrival 15 days ahead of expected 7/6 restock — possible early shipment, inter-channel transfer, or cancelled order回流。Small restock quantity (4 units) suggests supply fundamentals not yet reversed。Split_buy strategy maintained given short-term improvement but medium-term MLC/WF6 pressure。

escalatedRisks.risk: ⏳ Micron June 24 earnings (3 DAYS) — most important memory event of the year. Consensus $34.52B/$19.72EPS/~81%GM. MU ATH $1,133.99 (+297% YTD). HBM 2026 fully sold out, 2027 pricing +50%.
escalatedRisks.status: UPCOMING - 3 days (June 24, 2026)。Street consensus above guidance ($34.52B vs $33.5B guide)。MU hit ATH $1,133.99 on June 18。HBM 2026 fully sold out。Capex >$25B。FY2027 construction spending >$10B。High expectations = sell-the-news risk elevated。Key: FY2027 capex, HBM ramp trajectory, NAND ASP outlook, 9650 PCIe Gen6 SSD detail。
escalatedRisks.source: Micron IR / MarketBeat / multiple analysts / Alphastreet June 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Micron Q3 FY2026 earnings June 24 — the single most important memory industry event of the year。Capex raise to >$25B confirms structural supply shortage。FY2027 construction spending >$10B → meaningful new supply not before late 2027/2028。MU stock up 297% YTD — sell-the-news risk elevated given extreme expectations。Any miss on guidance could trigger sharp pullback but won't change fundamental supply/demand trajectory。
